summary: Mistral message.newChat mutation response body captured. Response is application/json with tRPC superjson serialization. Body contains 4 newline-delimited JSON objects (NOT a JSON array). Structure uses superjson encoding with index references for deserialization.

json_structure.format: Newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON) — 4 separate JSON objects, one per line

line_1_header.description: tRPC superjson header/metadata. Maps batch index 0 to serialization info.

line_2_result_wrapper.description: tRPC superjson result wrapper. Index 0 = batch procedure index, indicates success with result reference.

line_3_data_wrapper.description: tRPC superjson data wrapper. Points to the actual data payload.

line_4_actual_data.description: The actual mutation result data with the created user message object.

meta_section.description: superjson meta with type hints for deserialization

critical_findings.response_is_NDJSON_not_array: The response body is 4 newline-delimited JSON objects, NOT wrapped in a JSON array []. Each line is a complete JSON object.
critical_findings.superjson_encoding: Uses tRPC superjson format where actual data is referenced by numeric indices. The first 3 lines are superjson metadata/wrappers, line 4 contains the actual message data.
critical_findings.content_type_is_json: Content-Type: application/json (NOT text/event-stream). This is a regular JSON mutation response, not streaming.
critical_findings.chatId_in_response: c70dbed0-0fc8-4306-b7a2-a4a2447454be — the newly created chat ID

apf_implications.for_blocking_at_mutation: If APF blocks at message.newChat, the fake response must be NDJSON format (4 newline-separated JSON objects), NOT a JSON array. Content-Type must be application/json.
apf_implications.minimal_fake_response: APF needs to return at minimum: superjson header + result wrapper + data wrapper + data with messages object containing chatId, id, role, content, generationStatus, status fields
apf_implications.two_endpoint_reminder: This mutation response alone won't show a warning. The actual AI response streams via /api/chat (text/event-stream with tRPC indexed format). APF must handle BOTH endpoints for a complete warning flow.
